column8: Brownish green cobbles and gravels of moderately decomposed granite. (FILL)
Angular Cobbles and Gravels of moderately decomposed granite with traces of steel fragment and steel fragment. (FILL) Wash boring. (No recovery)

Moderately strong to strong, brownish pink spotted black and white, FINE GRAIN, moderately to slightly decomposed GRANITE. With closely spaced to medium spaced, very narrow to narrow, black and yellow quartz, limonite, manganese stained and kaolin filled joints dipping 10 degrees, 20 degrees, 40 degrees, 65 degrees, 75 degrees, 85 degrees
